text:
Congratulations on your impressive results! Here are your biggest wins from the audit:

1. **Structured Data Score: 98/100** - This is an excellent score, indicating that your website is well-optimized for search engines to understand your content through structured data. This can significantly enhance your visibility.

2. **Entity Definitions Score: 88/100** - Another strong score! This suggests that your site effectively defines entities, which helps AI agents understand the context and relevance of your content.

These high scores are fantastic achievements and show that you're on the right track with your website's optimization. Keep up the great work! If you have any questions about how to build on these successes or address areas for improvement, feel free to ask!
